## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategies to drive enterprise customer acquisition and close larger deals.](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Identify a focused list of top 100 enterprise software accounts and distribution/technology partners to target](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Create an enterprise-focused website page highlighting marquee customers, partner ecosystem, and product capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Organize a webinar/roundtable with existing enterprise customers to showcase their success stories](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Prioritize marketing efforts like account-based marketing to engage and educate target enterprises](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)

## Topics

### Targeted Enterprise Account List

  - [Chris and team working on a list of top 100 enterprise accounts representing significant revenue potential (\~$15M for 2025)](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Categorizing accounts into enterprise software, distribution partners, technology partners](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Defining account mapping, champions, and strategic go-to-market motions per account](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

### Enterprise Marketing Initiatives

  - [Create dedicated "Enterprise" or "Enterprise & Partners" page on website](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
      - [Highlight marquee enterprise customers (e.g. AWS, Motorola)](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
      - [Showcase partner ecosystem (Five9, CoreGenesis)](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Highlight enterprise-grade product capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Organize webinar/virtual roundtable with 2-3 existing enterprise customers](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
      - [Discuss how they are leveraging Anthropic's voice AI](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [Drive signups by promoting heavily](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)

### Product Roadmap for Enterprise

  - [Get firm timeline from product team on enterprise-focused capabilities discussed](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Potentially announce "Enterprise Offering" once roadmap items are delivered](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marketing to prioritize creating enterprise-focused website page in current quarter](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Identify 3 enterprise customer quotes/logos to feature](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Plan webinar/roundtable with those same customers](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Promote webinar internally with incentives for driving registrations](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Sync with product team on enterprise roadmap commitments](https://fathom.video/share/DuATRGSvyvvm3nJ7xXVoYCxxsx1YSaLf?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
